vocab.meaning: xây dựng/tỏa ra một hình ảnh về
vocab.example: High-profile executives often wear premium timepieces to project an image of success and reliability.
Unlike fashion items that depreciate, a rare watch is seen as a tangible asset that can be liquidated if necessary.

vocab.meaning: có mức giá cao kỷ lục/đắt giá
vocab.example: Watches with a historical pedigree usually command a premium among serious collectors.

vocab.meaning: đạt được một vị thế/tầm vóc nhất định
vocab.example: Many individuals purchase luxury watches once they attain a certain stature in their professional careers.

vocab.meaning: khả năng cảm thụ thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: For some, an expensive watch is a way to express their sophisticated aesthetic sensibilities.

vocab.meaning: sự chế tác vô song/không gì sánh bằng
vocab.example: The allure of high-end brands often lies in the unparalleled craftsmanship of their hand-assembled movements.

vocab.meaning: sự công nhận từ xã hội
vocab.example: Wearing a globally recognized brand can provide a sense of social validation in certain elite circles.

vocab.meaning: kết hợp hoàn hảo giữa hình thức và chức năng
vocab.example: Top-tier watches are admired because they perfectly marry form and function through elegant engineering.

vocab.meaning: dấu hiệu của sự khác biệt/ưu tú
vocab.example: In many cultures, a luxury watch serves as a subtle mark of distinction that sets an individual apart.
Owning a piece of fine jewelry like a high-end watch can significantly bolster self-confidence during public speaking.
